---
title: "Class 14: Regression Discontinuity, Part II"
date: 2026-02-26
---

Today we'll apply RD to real data using Medicare Advantage star ratings, and learn to validate the design.

## Objectives

- Implement an RD strategy with real data (MA star ratings)
- Define "manipulation" of the running variable and test for it
- Define what we mean by "covariate balance" and why it matters for RD
- Estimate RD effects across multiple thresholds


## Activities

- Implement an RD strategy with Medicare Advantage star ratings
- Test for manipulation of the running variable
- Test for covariate balance
- Estimate and compare effects across star rating cutoffs
